verses.1: Hallelujah! Praise God in His sanctuary. Praise Him in His mighty heavens.
verses.2: Praise Him for His mighty acts; praise Him for His excellent greatness.
verses.3: Praise Him with the sound of the horn; praise Him with the harp and lyre.
verses.4: Praise Him with tambourine and dancing; praise Him with strings and flute.
verses.5: Praise Him with clashing cymbals; praise Him with resounding cymbals.
verses.6: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD! Hallelujah!

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
